resources.string:
CodeAssist has been rebuilt with a new on-device build system. It uses its own project configuration, so projects from a previous version aren't compatible and won't open automatically.
Back up your projects to a .zip now — your source files stay safe, and you can re-add them to a new project.

Share anonymous performance data so we can see what's slow and what's failing — and fix the right things.
We collect: your app version and device model, how long builds, indexing, and code completion take, build success/failure, and scrubbed crash reports.
We never collect your code, file or project names, which features you use, or anything that identifies you. You can change this anytime under More while a project is open.
A real IDE. On your phone.
Write, navigate, and build Android & Java projects end to end — no laptop required.
Eclipse JDT powers precise, ranked suggestions — with signatures and docs — as you type.
Edit as code, or as blocks.
Project any Java file into interlocking blocks — a live view of the same source, byte for byte.
Resolve, compile, dex, package, sign — then install straight to your phone.
One input for commands, files, and symbols — the accelerator behind everything.
Full Kotlin code completion, tuned to the same calm, ranked experience as Java.
Tag, attribute, and resource completion for Android XML — with live validation.
Your projects, in a real folder.
Projects live in app storage you can open from any file manager — drop in icons, layouts, or assets, or edit from a PC. No special permissions, nothing hidden.
A faster, smoother CodeAssist — native Compose throughout, with live @Preview.
Open a project or start a new one.
Android app, Java console app, library…
Chat, get help, and share what you build on Discord.
No projects yet — create one to get started.
Some features may be incomplete or change. We'd love your feedback — tell us what's missing or broken.
Open this folder in any file manager to browse your projects (including any from older versions, under "Projects"), add icons or assets, or edit from a PC.
“%1$s” and all of its files will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.

plurals.name: recovered_projects
plurals.item: Recovered %1$d project from an older version
Recovered %1$d projects from an older version

resources.string: These use Gradle and open in a limited compatibility mode — some features may not work and they may not build until dependencies are re-added. Your original files are kept safe in your storage folder.
